name: Attack
description: Make one or more weapon or unarmed strikes.

name: Dash
description: Gain extra movement equal to your Speed for this turn.

name: Disengage
description: Your movement doesn't provoke Opportunity Attacks for the rest of the turn.

name: Dodge
description: Until your next turn, attack rolls against you have Disadvantage and you have Advantage on DEX saves, provided you aren't Incapacitated.

name: Help
description: Give a creature Advantage on its next ability check, or distract an enemy to give an ally Advantage on the next attack roll against it.

name: Hide
description: Make a DEX (Stealth) check to gain the Invisible condition against creatures that fail to perceive you.

name: Influence
description: Make a CHA (Deception, Intimidation, Performance, or Persuasion) or WIS (Animal Handling) check to alter an NPC's attitude.

name: Magic
description: Cast a spell, use a magic item, or use a feature that requires a Magic action.

name: Ready
description: Prepare a specific action to trigger as a Reaction when a defined condition occurs before your next turn.

name: Search
description: Make a WIS (Perception) or INT (Investigation) check to locate something.

name: Study
description: Make an INT check using a relevant skill to recall lore or glean information about something you can observe.

name: Utilize
description: Use a nonmagical object that requires an action (e.g. picking a lock, administering a potion to another, using a tool).
